title: centrostachys alba
intro: Centrostachys alba, also known as "White Fountain Grass" or "White Fountain Plant", is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in Central and South America, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centrostachys alba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and dermatitis. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
